basics.name: Yanjing Yang (杨焱景)
basics.summary: Direct-admission Ph.D. Candidate in Software Engineering at Nanjing University. Research interests include source code security, API security and API breaking-change analysis, LLM-based vulnerability detection, and robustness of AI-based vulnerability detection.

work.name: National Natural Science Foundation of China
work.position: 大规模软件系统的持续集成关键支持技术研究
work.summary: Project No. 62202219. Principal Investigator: Bohan Liu. Institution: Nanjing University.

work.name: CCF Populus Grove Project
work.position: Researcher, Multi-Agent Collaboration Task Error Detection
work.summary: Anomaly detection and feedback for multi-agent collaboration systems in code generation.

work.name: CCF Populus Grove Project
work.position: Researcher, Vulnerability Detection Based on LLM in OpenHarmony
work.summary: Fine-tuned LLMs with HarmonyOS vulnerability information and optimized vulnerability detection models.

work.name: CCF Populus Grove Project
work.summary: Designed core algorithms for agentic AI based API security, including black-box API discovery and detection of malicious payloads and abnormal API call patterns.

skills.name: Research Areas
keywords: API security and API breaking-change analysis

publications.name: Towards Robust Detection for Malicious Injection Variants
publications.summary: Accepted. CCF A; 中科院SCI 1区 TOP. Y. Yang, B. Liu, H. Zhang, J. Xu, X. Zhou, J. Lyu, Z. Mao, D. Pan.
